title: 届いた声も、アタシの力

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh? So this is camp, huh? Not bad. Kinda got a nice vibe to it. I bet
it'd make for a good photo shoot location!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yep. Fashionably late, but, we can make up for lost time, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. I'm sorry she couldn't be here earlier—schedules didn't
quite work out.
choice_data_list: No worries. Just glad she could make it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Right, I'm gonna drop my stuff off and get changed.
choice_data_list: See you on the beach in twenty!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Excuuuse me? I'll be ready in ten. Don't underestimate how fast
models can get changed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City! Make sure to wear plenty of sunscreen, okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, don't need to tell me twice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, Gold City's summer training begins.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
We're all supposed to cook today? Huh? I've barely ever held a pan.
Whoa, nope, nope, nope!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine! Just calm down. You know, I've never seen you in such
a panic before. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: City! C'mon, it's a beautiful morning for training!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, I'm so done. Anything but early mornings... Nope, not
happening.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, one more race! And this time I'm winning!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: You're on, but I'm not losing. I'll bet you three premium carrots.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Someone's feeling feisty! I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After dinner, Gold City comes up to me and says she wants to talk
outside.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'd just about given up on coming here. With work and
more work, it wasn't looking like I could make it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But, you helped me figure out a schedule, and I told my manager how
I feel... And, well, here I am.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, me too. Really, I am... Before, I probably would've just gotten
pissed and complained about it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! Can you not?! But, well... I'm thankful, you know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I got here late, but you've kept me busy, and I've gotten a chance to
know the others.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No one's quite what they seem, are they? I guess I was judging others
by what was on the surface, too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, apparently there's going to be like a festival nearby. Want
to check it out? I bet we'll see a lot of different faces!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's City! She's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: I, um... I-I'm a big fan!

text_block_list.name: Stall Staff
text_block_list.text: Here, take one. They're delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's popular, all right. You can tell she's used to the attention by the
way she smiles at the people who come up to her.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: City, you're the best.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'd be really happy if you'd watch me race too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Heh, didn't think so many people would recognize me here. Kinda
funny.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Which labor—modeling or racing? Hard to tell which one they're
talking about. All I really want people to notice is my running.
choice_data_list: Maybe your modeling can help your running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? As if.
choice_data_list: Why don't you go for a run and find out?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Go for a run? Wait, like now?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sooo why exactly did you drag me out of the festival for this? I swear, I am never going to get you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hello?! Ugh, fine, whatever. Okay, here I go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She kicks up a sandstorm across the beach!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Phew... My time? Yep, about what I expected.
choice_data_list:
Now go again, but hear your fans cheering you
on.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? As if that's gonna change anything. Whatever, here goes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She gives it another go, but this time...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ugh, don't you ever get tired? Oh wait, back at the festival...

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: City, you're the best.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Something lights a fire under her feet, and...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She sets a new personal best for the summer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew. You reminded me of that kid from the festival, and then my legs... they just, like, surged ahead.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What, like they give me the power to go that extra distance? Well, in
that case...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What if I... take all the fans of my modeling work, and get them to
come to my races?
choice_data_list: The stands will be roaring for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Geez, manipulative much? Using my fans like that. I knew there was an evil mastermind behind the mask.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But... Heh. I like it. Most of my fans only know me as a model, and
now I can show them what I'm like on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Then they'll see I'm not just some pretty doll—I'm a champion!
choice_data_list: Run two roads, you get double the mileage.
Run two roads, you get double the mileage.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, okay, you got me on board. If I want to win, I'll need you
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So, uh... Let's keep it up, yeah? Partner.
